bedrock_config.criteria: Select posts that mention customer service issues, complaints, or negative experiences that require immediate attention

walls_io_config.description: Configuration options for Walls.io API parameters

parameter_descriptions.limit: Maximum number of posts to receive (1-1000, default: 50)
parameter_descriptions.after: Post ID for pagination - receive posts with higher IDs
parameter_descriptions.before: Post ID for pagination - receive posts with lower IDs
parameter_descriptions.fields: Comma-separated list of fields to receive for each post
parameter_descriptions.types: Comma-separated list of post types (instagram, twitter, facebook, etc.)
parameter_descriptions.media_types: Comma-separated list of media types (text, image, video)
parameter_descriptions.languages: Comma-separated list of ISO 639-1 language codes
parameter_descriptions.pinned_only: Set to 1 to receive only pinned posts
parameter_descriptions.include_inactive: Set to 1 to include inactive posts (default: active only)
parameter_descriptions.include_source: Set to 1 to include source information
parameter_descriptions.sort: Sort order (e.g., '-id' for descending ID, 'external_fullname' for ascending name)

bedrock_config_options.description: Configuration options for Amazon Bedrock AI evaluation

parameter_descriptions.criteria: Natural language description of which posts to select
parameter_descriptions.region: AWS region for Bedrock service (us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-west-1, etc.)
parameter_descriptions.model_id: Bedrock model identifier to use for evaluation
parameter_descriptions.fallback_on_error: Process all posts if Bedrock evaluation fails (true/false)
parameter_descriptions.temperature: Model temperature for consistency (0.0-1.0, lower = more consistent)

criteria_examples.customer_service: Select posts that mention customer service issues, complaints, or negative experiences that require immediate attention
criteria_examples.brand_monitoring: Select posts that mention our brand name or products in a way that requires marketing team follow-up
criteria_examples.crisis_management: Select posts that indicate potential PR crises, safety concerns, or viral negative content that needs urgent escalation
criteria_examples.product_feedback: Select posts that provide specific product feedback, feature requests, or detailed user experiences that could inform product development
criteria_examples.influencer_engagement: Select posts from accounts with large followings that mention our brand positively and could be good for partnership opportunities
criteria_examples.multilingual_support: Select non-English posts that express confusion, ask questions, or need customer support in their native language
criteria_examples.urgent_issues: Select posts that express urgent needs, emergency situations, or time-sensitive requests
criteria_examples.sentiment_based: Select posts with negative sentiment that mention specific product issues or service failures
